rows.label: qev060302_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ah... Not enough, not enough.
There isn't enough stimulation...
More stimulation for me...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev060302_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask what kind of stimulation he is seeking.

rows.label: qev060302_JNK0020
rows.name: Request

rows.label: qev060302_SEL0021
rows.name: Relay the request from Troylan.

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0002
rows.name:
I absolutely love making things! Unknown
technology is just irresistible![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0003
rows.name:
However, the technological level
of Earthlings was simply not enough
to satisfy my curiosity...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0004
rows.name:
It almost makes me harbor the dangerous thought
that I might have encountered more advanced
technology had I been with the Growth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0005
rows.name:
What did you say? A request from
Troylan the Zaruboggan!? And to
request me by name, what an honor![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0006
rows.name:
Well then, please show me the item
that needs repairing immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0007
rows.name:
So this is a Gorkwa... I've seen
the Zaruboggan holding them and
always wanted to touch one...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0008
rows.name:
To think I would encounter one like this!
Magnificent... It has a form that makes
my curiosity feel like bursting![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0009
rows.name:
I will estimate the cost of
repairs, so please wait a moment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0010
rows.name:
Unfortunately, I cannot repair it with
only the materials I have on hand...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0011
rows.name:
If I had a high-performance sensor
part and a splendid great fang, I
could make it as good as new.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0012
rows.name:
I apologize for the trouble, but
could you obtain them for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0013
rows.name:
Until then, I will thoroughly
enjoy this Gorkwa... Ah, I mean,
I will do the prep work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0014
rows.name:
What is needed for the repairs
is a high-performance sensor
part and a splendid great fang.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0015
rows.name:
I believe a high-performance sensor part can be obtained
from Zigs in Shiraki no Tairiku, and a splendid great
fang from Hippos in Primordial Wilderness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0016
rows.name:
Well, it's fine if it takes a while. It
just means more time for me to thoroughly
enjoy this Gorkwa... Magnificent![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0017
rows.name:
Oh, is my time already up? It is a
shame, but let's do the repairs...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0018
rows.name:
I have indeed received them.
Please wait a moment...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0019
rows.name:
It's done! The more I look
at it, the more magnificent
it is! Don't you think so?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_JNK0030
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev060302_SEL0031
rows.name: Praise Zaruboggan technology.

rows.label: qev060302_JNK0040
rows.name: Praise

rows.label: qev060302_SEL0041
rows.name: Praise Luldeyu's technical skills.

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0020
rows.name:
From what I have heard, this
staff, the Gorkwa, is not
actually Zaruboggan technology.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0021
rows.name:
What exactly is their existence...? They
are truly a fascinating alien race.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0022
rows.name:
I only did it to satisfy my own curiosity,
but it makes me happy to be praised.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0023
rows.name:
I said Earthlings lack stimulation
earlier, but I correct myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0024
rows.name:
Bringing me such a magnificent
request... It's the best![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0025
rows.name:
Oops, let's wrap up our talk here.
Hurry up and return it to Troylan-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0026
rows.name:
It's more important to him than his life,
right? Come on, as fast as possible![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0027
rows.name: Please make a mad dash for it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0028
rows.name:
The structure of the Gorkwa
was truly fascinating...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0029
rows.name:
Come on, don't dawdle around here.
Hurry up and return it to Troylan-san
as fast as possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0030
rows.name:
Oh... Luldeyu-san isn't here.
Chiromil is here instead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0031
rows.name:
Hello, Troylan. Did you need
Luldeyu for something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0032
rows.name:
I had something I wanted to ask him
regarding my Gorkwa... Where did he go?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0033
rows.name:
Kurogane no Tairiku. He asked me
to tell him a place where there's
a lot of Voltant, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0034
rows.name:
Ahh! Could Luldeyu-san have
taken my Gorkwa with him...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0035
rows.name:
I didn't know whose it was, but he
definitely took a Gorkwa with him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0036
rows.name:
He was excitedly saying that with
this, he could test its performance
and research it further.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0037
rows.name:
Are you saying that Luldeyu-san not
only repaired it, but also made a
perfect replica to hand over to me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0038
rows.name: ...Why didn't you stop Luldeyu-san?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0039
rows.name:
Because he told me he would give
me a massive amount of Voltant if
I watched the shop for him, ne.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0040
rows.name: You still should have stopped him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0041
rows.name:
If someone without a backpack uses
a Gorkwa, they will absorb the
Voltant directly into their body![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0042
rows.name:
If a Ma-non were to die because
of our negligence, it would
be a massive problem.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0043
rows.name:
He's the type who wears a backpack just
like us, so I thought it would be fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0044
rows.name: How could that possibly be the case.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0045
rows.name:
...Speaking of Kurogane no
Tairiku, is it Lake Hakurin?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0046
rows.name: Good guess, Troylan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0047
rows.name: We can't afford to be leisurely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0048
rows.name:
We must stop Luldeyu-san! And above
all else, I must recover my Gorkwa![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0049
rows.name: I'm counting on you, [ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0050
rows.name:
In the end, you're just relying
on someone else, huh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0051
rows.name:
R-Revoltanting is... such
a painful... thing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0052
rows.name:
It hurts so much... the faces of
my grandfather and grandmother
are flashing before my eyes...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0053
rows.name:
What is this... I've never
experienced... this sensation before...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0054
rows.name: This feeling...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0055
rows.name:
Ah, and now I can start
to see [ST:playername ]'s figure...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_JNK0050
rows.name: Scold

rows.label: qev060302_SEL0051
rows.name: Confront Luldeyu about his deception.

rows.label: qev060302_JNK0060
rows.name: Help

rows.label: qev060302_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask if Luldeyu is alright.

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0056
rows.name:
You have an incredibly
scary expression...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0057
rows.name:
What are you saying...
I can't hear you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0058
rows.name: I've realized it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0059
rows.name: Keeping quiet to Troylan...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0060
rows.name:
Swapping it for a fake was
a bad idea, wasn't it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0061
rows.name: I won't... do it again...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0062
rows.name: ...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060302_MSG0063
rows.name: ...[ST:wait ]
